raw_consumer_statement:
I filed for unauthorized charges on my Home Depot credit card multiple times ( I had to re-open the case for them to look further into it ) and each time they stated that they would put my charges back on the card. 
The dates that were not authorized by me were : XX/XX/XXXX for {$160.00} XX/XX/XXXX for {$410.00} Both of these purchases were made in XXXX, Florida - I do not live there and I've only made one purchase on the card which was made in XXXX, Florida. 
I'd like to have these charges removed - I find it not fair that I am paying for something I did not even purchase. 

The credit card in question is my Home Depot card by Citi bank.
